docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-25-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-25-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BOWLES, PATRICIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BAX GLOBAL $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $88.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,588.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,500.00 FILED BY BOWLES, PATRICIA AS TO DEFENDANT BAX GLOBAL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-25-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-28-2008, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BAX GLOBAL
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
COPYING FEES PAID BY PLAINTIFF BOWLES, PATRICIA
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT BAX GLOBAL
COURTESY COPY TO THE COURT OF LETTER FROM DEFT TO PLTF RE PAYMENT OF JUDGEMENT AND FILING OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGEMENT.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF BOWLES, PATRICIA AS TO DEFENDANT BAX GLOBAL
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-25-2008 - JUDGMENT.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT BAX GLOBAL
